# TW Market Data - LLM Full Index

TW Market Data 提供台股資料 API，採 official/public-first 與 controlled rollout。

## Canonical Docs Entry
- /docs/introduction
- /docs/quick-start
- /docs/data-provenance
- /docs/market-coverage
- /docs/openapi-spec
- /docs/tools-mcp

## Endpoint Groups

### Market Prices
- GET /v2/datasets/twse-daily-price
- GET /v2/datasets/tpex-daily-price
- GET /v2/datasets/index-data
- GET /v2/datasets/market-breadth
- GET /v2/datasets/interest-rate-snapshot
- GET /v2/datasets/technical-indicators

### Financials and Growth
- GET /v2/datasets/monthly-revenue
- GET /v2/datasets/income-statement
- GET /v2/datasets/balance-sheet
- GET /v2/datasets/cash-flow-statement
- GET /v2/datasets/valuation-data

### Capital Flow
- GET /v2/datasets/institutional-flow
- GET /v2/datasets/margin-short

### Company and Events
- GET /v2/datasets/issuer-profile
- GET /v2/datasets/issuer-announcements
- GET /v2/datasets/events
- GET /v2/datasets/structured-events
- GET /v2/datasets/corporate-actions
- GET /v2/datasets/dividends

### Classification and Mapping
- GET /v2/datasets/theme-taxonomy
- GET /v2/datasets/index-classification

### Strategy and Quant
- GET /v2/datasets/features
- GET /v2/datasets/factor-data
- GET /v2/datasets/time-alignment
- POST /v2/datasets/screener

### Query Tools
- GET /v2/search
- GET /v2/query
- GET /v2/query/fields
- GET /v2/query/examples

## Preview Datasets
- GET /v2/datasets/company-news
- GET /v2/datasets/market-news

## Not Marketed as Available-Now
- Additional future topics outside the current public boundary are not advertised as available-now.

## Usage Policy Notes
- API key access, rate limits, and dataset scope depend on plan and rollout stage.
- Use documentation and OpenAPI contract as the source of truth for active endpoints.
- Do not rely on private dashboard data, private tokens, or raw backend payloads.

## Contact
avenra.platform@gmail.com
